name: Chicken Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon chopped fresh or dried oregano leaves
2 teaspoons chopped fresh or dried basil leaves
1 ½ teaspoons chopped fresh or dried marjoram leaves
3/4 teaspoon chopped fresh or dried rosemary leaves
1 ½ cups cut-up cooked chicken or turkey
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat all ingredients except chicken and spaghetti to boiling in a 10-inch skillet.
2. Reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in the chicken. Cover and simmer for another 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove the bay leaf. Serve the sauce over the spaghetti.
